calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-08-2022 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-25-2022 Continued To Dec-12-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Regarding Trial Readiness
Off Calendar Jul-25-2022 Text Ruling

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Case Management Hearing
Off Calendar Jul-25-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Martin Glickfeld, via Zoom, for Anthony Smith, Petitioner; Eric Stone, via Zoom, for Rhowana Gandy, Objector.

The court and counsel discuss the trial readiness of this matter with the court pointing to the joint statement regarding the same. Counsel is reminded that they had advised the court earlier this year that the matter was ready for trial and that typically, the probate department is not inclined to move trial dates but is willing to make a one-time exception.

After additional discussion, the matter is now set for trial in the department of the Presiding Judge (206) on Dec-12-2022 at 9:30 am. Order for the same signed in open court. The matters set for hearing today are taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Case Management Hearing
Off Calendar Apr-25-2022 Continued To Jul-25-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Martin Glickfeld, via Zoom, for Anthony V. Smith, Petitioner; Milla Lvovich, via Zoom, for Rhowana Gandy, Objector.

Counsel provides oral testimony regarding their respective positions including incomplete discovery and being amenable to mediation. Counsel also believes this matter can be set for trial. After additional discussion, the Petition in this matter is set for trial in the Department of the Presiding Judge (206) on Sep-19-2022 at 9:30 a.m., order for the same signed in open court. A copy of the order and notice of trial will be forwarded to Counsel via U.S. mail. The Case Management Hearing and underlying Petition are continued to Jul-25-2022.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Gomez. Not reported.

***After hearing: upon further consideration, the court sets a status hearing regarding trial readiness in the underlying petition for Jul-25-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Petition To Determine The Validity Of The 2014 Amendment To The Shirley M. Smith Trust, For Removal Of Trustee, For Accounting, For Imposition
Off Calendar Nov-15-2021 Continued To Feb-14-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Martin Glickfeld, via ZOOM, for Anthony Smith, Petitioner; Edward Broitman, via ZOOM, for Rhowanda Gamby, Respondent.

The court confirms with counsel that mediation took place but did not result in a settlement. Mr. Glickfeld reports that some discovery remains and proposes setting a trial for March of 2022. Mr. Broitman reports that the parties did not use all four hours of pro bono mediation and that it might be beneficial to use the remaining hours. The court advises the parties that it will be setting a Case Management Hearing for Feb-14-2022. The court will draft the order and issue it accordingly.

The Petition to Determine the Validity of, etc., is continued to Feb-14-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

Petition To Determine The Validity Of The 2014 Amendment To The Shirley M. Smith Trust, For Removal Of Trustee, For Accounting, For Imposition
Off Calendar Aug-16-2021 Continued To Nov-15-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Martin Glickfeld appeared by zoom for Petitioner.
Edward Broitman appeared by zoom for Rhowana Gandy (Trustee/Respondent).

Mr. Broitman stated that the Trustee's address is 819 Page Street in San Francisco. Both parties indicated that they are open to mediation. Mr. Glickfeld stated that in order for mediation to be meaningful, he needs to do some discovery. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than November 1, 2021. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by November 8, 2021. The Petition to Determine Validity of the 2014 Amendment, etc. is continued to and the Parties are to return on November 15, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation. Counsel are to obtain a copy of the mediation order from the court's website.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
